cases.expected: Selecting a message row updates the detail plane without leaving /workspace/messages.
Provider acceptance keeps the ladder at transport-accepted and does not expose durable delivery language.
Contradictory same-fence evidence moves the thread into stale-recoverable posture and promotes dispute review.
When messaging is unsafe, route repair and callback fallback stay visible as governed next steps.
Attachment repair appears inside the repair workbench when the current failure mode is stripped artifacts.
Blocked route posture keeps chronology and repair scope visible while freezing writable actions.
Reload restores the selected message event anchor and repair or dispute stage when recoverable.
Back and forward navigation preserve the same thread anchor and in-shell repair stage.
